# Team Review Patterns
<!-- auto-generated by lens learn on 2026-05-10 -->

## [correctness]
### ts files
- Enforce pagination on list endpoints using the standard paginator library.
- Do not decode tokens in the application; rely on Nginx to pass decoded userId and roles via headers.
- Extend the common entity class for all database models instead of redefining standard fields.
- Use message brokers for asynchronous background tasks and RPC for synchronous inter-service communication instead of direct HTTP calls.
- Extract duplicate logic into shared methods to promote code reusability.
- Organize DTOs into separate, smaller files and follow specific naming conventions (e.g., .input, .output) instead of using generic .dto extensions.
- Avoid hardcoding values; utilize constants, environment variables, or configurations.
<!-- lens:generated:end -->
